name: control-mapping freshness gate: previously-demoted control automatically restores to its prior legal_review_status when its framework becomes fresh again
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch .claude-tdd-pro && echo "2026-05-13T08:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/nist-csf-2.txt && printf "{"nist-csf-2:GV.OC":{"original":"reviewed_by:legal:2026-01-01","demoted":"pending-stale-source"}}" > .claude-tdd-pro/control-demotions.json && printf -- "- framework: nist-csf-2
  control_id: GV.OC
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule:g-x-001]
  legal_review_status: pending-stale-source
" > controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/control-mapping-gate.sh" --controls-file "$PWD/controls.yaml" --apply-to-controls --now 2026-05-13T12:00:00Z && grep -E "reviewed_by:legal:2026-01-01" controls.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
